scripts.format: biome format --write biome.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.web.json data/feeds.json src scripts tests
scripts.format:check: biome format biome.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.web.json data/feeds.json src scripts tests
scripts.lint:biome: biome lint biome.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.web.json data/feeds.json src scripts tests
scripts.check:fast: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint:biome && pnpm run lint
scripts.ci: pnpm run check:fast && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run verify:web-ui
